stemHtml: When approaching the destination airfield, the pilot is listening to the broadcast ATIS message. Regarding clouds, assuming there are no CBs reported, what will this ATIS message report?

options.a: All clouds at all altitudes in the vicinity of the destination airfield, and in areas where approach procedures are defined.
options.b: Clouds below 1500 m (5000 ft) or below the highest minimum sector altitude, whichever is greater.
options.c: Information about all clouds in the TMA concerned.
